title: feat(server): expose startExclusive and endExclusive in dateRange filter

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat(storage): Add startExclusive and endExclusive options to dateRange filter
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: predecessor - added these fields to the storage/core layer; this PR completes the work by exposing them in the HTTP API schema

summary: Adds startExclusive and endExclusive optional boolean fields to the dateRange filter in the server's Zod validation schema (memory.ts). PR #11479 previously added these fields to the core storage types and all store implementations, but the HTTP API schema was not updated to pass them through. This PR closes that gap, enabling proper cursor-based pagination via the HTTP API without timestamp workaround hacks. Includes 2 new test cases validating the schema parsing.
maintainerNotes: Clean, well-scoped follow-up to the merged PR #11479. The 2-line schema change correctly mirrors the core StorageGetMessagesArg type. Tests are thorough. Missing a changeset — author should be asked to add one. Some CI checks (MCP, E2E, Core, Memory, RAG) are still pending/queued but the build, lint, and validation checks all pass. No docs update needed since the storage-level docs were already updated in #11479, but verify whether the server/API reference docs need a mention of these new filter fields.
